title: Charred Tender Spanish Cabbage Paella
description: A hearty Spanish-inspired dish featuring Chinese cabbage, a hangover-cure, and a gluten-free twist.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for a further minute, stirring constantly.
Add the rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the water, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, char the Chinese cabbage by grilling or pan-frying it until slightly blackened.
Add the charred cabbage, chickpeas, and beurre monte to the paella pan, and stir to combine.
Simmer for a further 2-3 minutes, until the cabbage is tender and the beurre monte has melted.
Serve immediately, garnished with saffron threads if desired.
